features.description: Concurrency helper module with effective_* accessors and futures crate dependency

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub fn effective_upload_concurrency' src/concurrency.rs && grep -c 'pub fn effective_download_concurrency' src/concurrency.rs && grep -c 'pub fn effective_max_connections' src/concurrency.rs
layers.fail_message: Missing effective_* functions in src/concurrency.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after adding concurrency module

layers.name: behavioral
layers.fail_message: Concurrency helper tests failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Pure config accessor functions with no runtime behavior -- covered by unit tests

features.description: S3Client multipart upload methods (create, upload_part, complete, abort) and chunk size calculation

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub async fn create_multipart_upload' src/storage/s3.rs && grep -c 'pub async fn upload_part' src/storage/s3.rs && grep -c 'pub async fn complete_multipart_upload' src/storage/s3.rs && grep -c 'pub async fn abort_multipart_upload' src/storage/s3.rs && grep -c 'pub fn calculate_chunk_size' src/storage/s3.rs
layers.fail_message: Missing multipart upload methods on S3Client

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after adding multipart methods

layers.name: behavioral
layers.fail_message: S3 multipart unit tests failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Multipart upload requires real S3 endpoint -- exercised through F005 integration testing

features.description: Token-bucket rate limiter module with unlimited passthrough and concurrent sharing

features.description: Parallel FREEZE and collect in backup::create bounded by max_connections semaphore

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'Arc::new(Semaphore::new' src/backup/mod.rs && grep -c 'tokio::spawn' src/backup/mod.rs && grep -c 'try_join_all' src/backup/mod.rs

features.description: CLAUDE.md updated for all modified modules (backup, upload, download, restore, storage)

layers.name: structural
layers.command: for m in src/backup src/upload src/download src/restore src/storage; do test -f "$m/CLAUDE.md" || echo "MISSING: $m/CLAUDE.md"; done && echo PASS
layers.fail_message: One or more CLAUDE.md files missing

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: for m in src/backup src/upload src/download src/restore src/storage; do grep -q 'Parent Context' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Directory Structure' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Key Patterns' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Parent Rules' "$m/CLAUDE.md" || echo "FAIL: $m"; done && echo VALID
layers.fail_message: CLAUDE.md missing required sections
